name: Beef and Noodles W/Sour Cream & Paprika
recipeInstructions:
Melt butter in a large skillet over medium heat. Add ground beef, onion, and garlic; sauté until the meat loses its red color and the onion becomes tender, stirring occasionally with a fork to break up the meat.
Add mushrooms and cook for an additional 2 minutes, or until they release their moisture.
Pour in the dry red wine and lemon juice. Stir briefly to combine.
Add the beef bouillon cubes and water; stir gently.
Bring the mixture to a simmer uncovered, then reduce the heat to low. Simmer for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the noodles and return to a simmer. Cover and continue cooking for an additional 15 minutes, or until the noodles are tender. If needed, add more water to achieve the desired consistency.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Stir in the sour cream until just incorporated. Serve hot, garnished with paprika and chopped parsley.
